title: Xeriscaping
description: Cut your water bill and your maintenance time. We remove what isn't working, reshape your landscape with drought-tolerant plants, rock, and boulders, and give you a yard that thrives in the high desert — not one that fights it.

title: Landscape Design
description: David works directly with you on-site to understand your space, your goals, and what makes sense for your property. No middleman — you're getting ideas and expertise straight from the owner, tailored to your terrain and the Las Cruces climate.

title: Landscaping
description: Artificial turf, native plantings, sod, and more — installed by our crew and built to handle Las Cruces heat year-round. We focus on landscapes that look great without fighting the desert.

title: Hardscaping
description: Patios, walkways, driveways, pavers, and stone borders designed to complement your home and stand up to the desert climate. Built right the first time.

title: Irrigation & Sprinkler
description: Sprinkler systems, drip irrigation, smart controllers, and repair — plus french drains, erosion control, and stormwater solutions. We keep your landscape healthy and your water usage in check.

title: Landscape Maintenance
description: Seasonal cleanups, irrigation adjustments, and landscape upkeep to protect your investment. Call us when your yard needs attention — we'll keep it looking sharp.
